items.title: Strategist sees Deere, Caterpillar as low-volatility AI plays
items.description: STORY: "There's $640 billion in announced capex spending to grow AI compute," Mulberry explained. "That's data centers. So we can follow that money into balance sheets like John Deere, Caterpillar, even Lockheed Martin," companies that are "needed to move dirt to actually construct these very large buildings.""It's being dubbed the HALO trade," he added. "Hard Asset with Low chance of Obsolescence. These companies are going to be around for a long time with the amount of demand built up for AI computing power."

items.title: AVLV Is Up 24.5% While Filtering Out the Value Traps Other ETFs Miss
items.description: Most value ETFs simply screen for cheap stocks. The Avantis U.S. Large Cap Value ETF takes a different approach: it filters for stocks that are both cheap and profitable, a distinction that historically separates durable value from value traps. That dual screen is the core thesis behind AVLV, and whether it justifies owning it over ... AVLV Is Up 24.5% While Filtering Out the Value Traps Other ETFs Miss

items.title: Does Caterpillar’s AI Power Deal And Record Results Redefine The Bull Case For CAT?
items.description: Caterpillar recently delivered record quarterly and full-year results, with its Power & Energy unit posting 23% annual growth and securing a large agreement to supply natural gas generators and battery storage for 2 gigawatts of capacity at American Intelligence and Power’s Monarch Compute Campus by 2027. This surge in power-generation demand, including interest from hedge funds and customers beyond traditional data centers, has reinforced Caterpillar’s position in the fast-growing AI and...

items.title: Caterpillar vs Deere: Heavy Machinery Legends Post Opposite Earnings Stories and the Gap Is Widening Fast
items.description: Caterpillar (NYSE: CAT) and Deere (NYSE: DE) both reported recent quarters that tell strikingly different stories. Caterpillar posted a record quarter on surging data center power demand. Deere beat a depressed earnings bar and raised guidance, positioning itself as a cycle-bottom recovery play in agriculture and construction. Record Revenue for One, Recovery Signals for the ... Caterpillar vs Deere: Heavy Machinery Legends Post Opposite Earnings Stories and the Gap Is Widening Fast
